new_text: chainovi/eclipse-agave #21: Implemented tests 12-15 covering multi-block CU tracking, elevated base fees, projectdawn config serialization, and feature flag handling. All 17 fee/snapshot tests passing. Architecture: genesis deployment (fresh/snapshot/upgrade), token migration from Solana, staking system validated. Launch readiness ~7/10.

/web skill (v1.0): Persistent web page indexing via ChromaDB. Fetches URLs, strips boilerplate, converts to markdown, chunks by paragraphs, quality gates (50+ words, <80% links), semantic search, delete by pattern. Added chromadb_socket.delete(), memory_server web collection. 22 new tests, 971 passed total.

Session 222: Fixed diagram.html SVG arrow misalignment by replacing hardcoded paths with dynamic JS computing positions from element offsetLeft/offsetTop/offsetWidth/offsetHeight. Explained 3 visualization modules: gate_dashboard (ranked effectiveness), gate_graph (dependency tree, CLI), pipeline_optimizer (parallelization, CLI). Concluded not worth wiring into Analytics MCP.

torus-web #10: Components tested with @testing-library/react. Tier 1 (easy): feature-card, scientific-card, connect-wallet-prompt, theme-toggle. Tier 2 (medium): tournament-card, wallet-selection-modal, wallet-stats. Tier 3 (hard): ai-gateway-dashboard, steam-connection, admin-protected-route. Pages: home (animations), profile, rankings (pagination/filtering).

Fixed diagram.html SVG arrow bug: hardcoded viewBox coordinates didn't match CSS absolute-positioned nodes. Solution: dynamic JS computing arrow paths from offsetLeft/offsetTop/offsetWidth/offsetHeight, cubic bezier curves with auto-detected anchor sides. Added node hover highlights, zoom percentage label.

nicobailon/visual-explainer: Claude Code skill for terminal output to styled HTML (diagrams, decks, diffs, tables). Uses Mermaid.js, Chart.js, CSS Grid. Token cost massive (~37k tokens across all files). Verdict: Too bloated. Cherry-pick lean templates (~500 words) instead of carrying 9k words of unused slide patterns.

Created skills-catalog.html (1130 lines): Interactive 37-row sortable table (37 total skills: 6 Dev, 6 Research, 6 Ops, 5 Orchestration, 5 Advanced, 2 Creative, 2 Quality, 3 Build, 2 Trading). Rose/cranberry aesthetic (Instrument Serif + JetBrains Mono). JS: sort, filter, category buttons, collapsibles. Light/dark themes, staggered animations.

Created 3 HTML diagrams: 05-memory-system (Gruvbox, LanceDB/embedding/causal chain), 06-the-loop (Catppuccin, 7-step cycle with gates), 07-session-lifecycle (Nord, main/subagent flow). All: light/dark themes, Mermaid zoom/pan/expand, staggered animations, prefers-reduced-motion support, drag-to-pan, click-to-expand fullscreen.

Created two interactive HTML diagrams: 01-architecture-overview (40KB, Blueprint, 8-node Mermaid, 7 CSS Grid cards covering hooks/shared/tests/MCPs/skills/rules), 04-shared-modules (34KB, Paper/ink, 12-node dependency graph, 12 module groups). Both: no emoji, colored spans, no Roboto, light/dark, Mermaid controls, scroll-zoom, drag-pan, click-expand.

diagram.html redesigned (Session 236, 2026-02-25): CSS variables updated (--bg:#0d1117, monospace fonts Cascadia/JetBrains). Memory MCP: 4,303 lines, LanceDB storage, 8 search modes. Skills 35->35, ChromaDB removed for LanceDB Storage. Analytics MCP: transcript_context tool. Shared Infrastructure: 51 modules. Tests: 1,437 passing. v2.5.4.

Session 358: Created 19 interactive HTML diagrams (560KB total) in ~/.claude-visual/docs/diagrams/. Coverage: architecture, hooks, gates, shared modules, memory, loop, lifecycle, MCPs, agents, skills, modes, integrations, testing, config, PRPs, plugins, archive, scripts. All: Mermaid zoom/pan/expand, light/dark themes, staggered animations. Built with 7 parallel Opus agents.

Session visual-map (2026-03-06): Created 2 Excalidraw diagrams. 16-prps-domains: PRPs directory, PRP workflow (5 steps), domains structure, Gate 9 bridge. 17-plugins-system: plugins directory (blocklist/registry/marketplaces/cache), plugin lifecycle (discovery->validation->install->blocklist decision), registry functions, current state (0 installed). Both rendered to PNG.

Created 3 Excalidraw diagrams (Session visual-map, 2026-03-06): 04-hooks-directory (9 categories, ~27 files), 05-shared-modules (9 cluster groups, dependency graph), 06-memory-system (4-tier architecture, 8 MCP tools, causal chain, sideband protocol). All rendered to PNG with section-by-section build pattern and Python coord fixes.

Session 227: Housekeeping + 3-branch comparison (main vs self-evolve-test-branch vs Self-Sprint-2). self-evolve-test: leanest (~1,300 tokens), lacks G17-19/domains//learn. Self-Sprint-2: heaviest (~3,425 tokens), most capable. main: merge target, 1,590+ tests. Killed PID 1558049 frozen session. Deactivated framework domain per user request.

Structural audit ~/Desktop/torus-github/ (2026-02-26): All hook/skill/gate files present. Missing: top-level README.md. Confirmed: task_manager.py, torus-loop.sh, torus-wave.py, all 67 shared modules, gates 01-19 (except 08 dormant, 12 merged). No secrets in tracked files. Key gap: README for GitHub visibility.
